weekPriority: Successful launch and initial user acquisition for CognitoRipple

tasks.task: Execute comprehensive launch marketing campaign for CognitoRipple across all channels.
tasks.reason: Crucial for generating initial awareness, user acquisition, and breaking $0 revenue.

tasks.task: Set up and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) for CognitoRipple (downloads, daily active users, early retention).
tasks.reason: Understand initial user engagement and identify immediate areas for optimization or further promotion.

tasks.task: Gather initial user feedback for CognitoRipple to identify bugs, usability issues, and potential feature requests.
tasks.reason: Prepare for quick iterations and improve the game experience post-launch.

recommendation: Aggressively market CognitoRipple to establish an initial user base and generate first revenue.
